title: Of Love and Desire

actors: Merle Oberon, Steve Cochran, Curd Jürgens
plot: American engineer Steve Corey comes to Mexico to work at one of the mining projects owned by Katherine Beckman and her half-brother Paul. He meets Katherine, and the man he is replacing, Bill Maxton, tells him that Katherine is hi...
